Dear Tonny,

 

According to the Booking, INNSA/INMUN ~ SAJED is under IMR service, which the slot charge shall be settled by BSA&SLT, instead of J/O.

So please kindly contact with NPD team to update the BSA and SLT invoice accordingly.



Thanks & Best Regards!

Catherine KANG/康秀英
Business Analysis Manager
Digital & IT Department
E-mail: catherinekang@culines.com <mail
Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 



 


发送时间: 2026年3月9日 13:28
收件人: #CUL Allegro Support <allegrosupport@culines.com>; Catherine Kang/CUL-CN/IT <catherinekang@culines.com>; Joanne Ding/CUL-CN/IT <joanneding@culines.com>; Rita Qu/CUL-CN/FIN <ritaqu@culines.com>; Sharon Lim/CUL-SG/FIN <sharonlim@culines.com>; Daric
